@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false

class MonoBehaviour

class DrumCS {
  SE_Endtime : float
  --
  Start() : void
  Update() : void
  OnTriggerEnter(coll:Collider) : void
}

class GameObject
class AudioClip

DrumCS --|> MonoBehaviour

DrumCS --> GameObject : explosionPrefab
DrumCS --> GameObject : ExplosionPlayer
DrumCS --> AudioClip : ExplosionPlayerExplosion_SE
@enduml
